visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, sleek black hair and subtle pink-toned makeup is shown in a medium close-up profile. She wears a white graphic t-shirt and a large, puffy white scrunchie on her left wrist. Her expression is one of wide-eyed surprise and curiosity as she looks toward the right side of the frame against a blurred outdoor background of a red brick building. (2) The scene cuts to a bright, daytime urban street. In the foreground, a gray metal traffic light pole stands against a three-story white tiled building with traditional arched windows and red signage. The pedestrian signal is currently red, showing a stationary figure. Three small, white chicken figurines with bright red combs are perched on top of the signal box. (3) The camera zooms in as the signal transitions to green. A green animated chicken figure replaces the red man, appearing to walk forward. The background shows blurred motion of a person on a red scooter passing by at the bottom of the frame. The lighting is natural and clear, indicating a sunny or overcast day. (4) The pedestrian signal's animation speeds up, showing the green chicken running rapidly with a green trail effect behind it as the invisible timer likely nears zero. The video cuts back to the woman, who is now laughing and covering her mouth with her hand, her eyes squinted in amusement at the unique traffic signal.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in close-up, at least 3 individuals on scooters passing in the background of the street shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a white scrunchie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban city street in Chiayi, Taiwan, featuring a red brick building in the reaction shots and a white tiled commercial building with Chinese signs in the traffic light shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lighthearted, mid-tempo pizzicato string melody begins, featuring bright and percussive violin plucking that establishes a whimsical and comedic mood. The audio is clean, originating from a digital music source. (2) The instrumental track continues with a steady, bouncy rhythm. A very low-level background hum of outdoor urban traffic is slightly audible but does not interfere with the music. There are no spoken words or sound effects. (3) The pizzicato melody maintains its playful character through the end of the clip, providing a consistent tonal backdrop for the visual reaction sequence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique and humorous local feature of Chiayi, Taiwan—a turkey-themed traffic light—through a tourist's candid reaction, likely aimed at social media engagement and travel interest.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes the 'POV' trend and reaction format to highlight local culture. The specific 'running chicken' animation on the traffic light is a well-known quirk of Chiayi City.
